description: dispatch-save-request.ts is imported in pipeline.ts (line 28) but never called. The pipeline handles Step 3 inline (lines 122-140) rather than delegating to dispatchSaveRequest. This creates dead code. Furthermore, DispatchSaveRequestDeps includes serializeNote as an injected port (line 25), which contradicts REQ-006 and the purity boundary design where serializeNote is called directly as a pure function. Additionally, dispatchSaveRequest's return type is Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, SaveError>> (line 48), but the canonical DispatchSaveRequest type in workflows.ts lines 61-65 returns Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, NoteSaveFailed>>. Three compounding issues in one unused module.
